name: /pr-corpus-update writes consumed token total back to the budget file when dry-run is not set
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus && printf '{"cfpb-consumerfinance":{"used_today":1000}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/pr-corpus-update.sh" --source cfpb-consumerfinance --upstream-stub fixtures/prs.jsonl --consumed-tokens 4000 --budget .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"used_today":5000' .claude-tdd-pro/pr-corpus/budget.json && echo ok 1>&2
